impact: This advances the PP&D missing-information guardrails by proving agents only ask source-backed, narrow, non-consequential clarification questions and fail closed when evidence is stale, conflicting, uncited, or derived from private DevHub state.
summary: Add fixture-only validation for missing-information response plans, including source linkage, narrow redacted questions, safe defaults, and blocked evidence failure modes.
target_task: Task checkbox-116: Task checkbox-111: Add validation for missing-information response plan fixtures proving questions are source-linked, narrow, redacted, non-consequential by default, and blocked when evidence is stale, conflicting, uncited, or tied to private DevHub state.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
